---
name: Content update
about: Correction or update to document content (numbers, terminology, claims)
labels: content
---

**Document**
Which file needs updating? (e.g. whitepaper.html, competitor-analysis.md)

**Section or line**
Where is the issue?

**Current text**
What does it say now?

**Proposed text**
What should it say?

**Reason**
Why does this need changing? (e.g. new source data, Midnight Network docs update, factual error)
